pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Flexible EC2 Development Instance implements encryption at rest and in transit, IAM roles with least-privilege policies, network isolation via VPC and security groups. All sensitive configurations are parameterized to enforce organizational standards.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Multi-AZ deployment ensures resilience against availability zone failures. Automated backups with configurable retention protect against data loss. Auto-scaling maintains performance under varying load.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Non-production configuration uses smaller instance sizes and reduced redundancy to minimize costs. Auto-scaling prevents over-provisioning during low-demand periods.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: CloudWatch metrics provide visibility into resource utilization. Load balancing distributes traffic across healthy targets. Auto-scaling adjusts capacity to maintain response times.

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: CloudWatch integration enables proactive monitoring and alerting. Consistent resource tagging supports cost allocation and operational visibility. Pulumi state management tracks all infrastructure changes with full audit trail.

features: Encryption at rest and in transit
